summary: Iteration 21 — verified 3 fixes (BUG1 SeniorTM canEdit KM save / PATCH; BUG2 receipts.zip valid ZIP for all roles; FEATURE3 DELETE /api/reimbursement/reports/{id}). Fixed one 500 caused by wrong _audit kwarg in the new delete endpoint. All 15 new backend tests + 34 regression tests pass. Frontend delete flow, delete button visibility, and KM save enablement verified via Playwright for SeniorTM/TM/Admin.
critical_code_review_comments: delete_reimbursement_report initially called `_audit(..., old=...)` but the helper's signature is `prev=`. This caused every DELETE to 500. Fixed by renaming kwarg to `prev`. Recommend a lightweight unit-level smoke test that touches every new endpoint before shipping (this would have caught it).

The is_tm_scope path in update_reimbursement_report now allows SeniorTM to edit their own draft — verified 403 still raised when SeniorTM attempts to PATCH someone else's report and when status != Draft/Changes Requested.
Frontend Reimbursement.jsx crossed 600 lines — consider splitting the drawer body (MissingKMRow, EventKMRow, ManualExpense list) into its own module for maintainability.
updated_files: /app/backend/routers/reimbursement.py (fixed _audit kwarg old → prev in DELETE endpoint)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (delete flow, delete-button visibility, KM save enablement verified)

test_credentials: TM tm1@field.io/tm123, SeniorTM snr.demo.1782126329@field.io/senior123, Admin admin@field.io/admin123, Owner martennis89@gmail.com/1234 (all working).
seed_data_creation: TestBug2ReceiptsZip fixture seeds one Petrol expense for TM+SeniorTM in last_month to guarantee non-empty ZIP responses. Delete tests idempotently wipe (tm_user_id, month) reports before regenerating.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend DELETE endpoint at /api/reimbursement/reports/{id} — matrix: TM/SeniorTM own+Draft/ChangesRequested=200, TM/SeniorTM own+other-status=403, Admin/Owner=200 always, non-existent=404. Frontend uses window.confirm() — override with `page.evaluate('window.confirm=()=>true')` after page load before clicking delete-report-{id}. SeniorTM demo account (snr.demo.1782126329) has 0 visits in test months, so their auto-generated report has empty doctor_breakdown/event_breakdown — TM (tm1) is the account with real visit history for KM save UI tests. receipts.zip verified via `r.content[:4] == b'PK\x03\x04'`, Content-Type application/zip, and non-empty Content-Length.
rca of the issue: Root cause of 500 on DELETE: shipped code called `_audit(user, 'delete', 'reimbursement_report', id, old={...})` but /app/backend/server.py::_audit uses the parameter name `prev`, not `old`. Python raises TypeError immediately — the endpoint returned 500 with 'unexpected keyword argument old'. Reproduction: DELETE any reimbursement report. Fix: replaced `old=` with `prev=` at line 599. Confirmed by re-running the full pytest suite (15/15 pass) and end-to-end via SeniorTM UI (toast + row removed).
